headline: Recurrent Neural Networks (RNN)
description: RNNs process sequential data (text, time series, speech) by maintaining a hidden state that captures information from previous steps. Unlike feedforward networks, RNNs have recurrent connections — output at time t depends on input at t and hidden state from t-1.

citation.name: State Space Models as Modern RNNs: A Survey of Mamba, S4, and Linear Recurrent Architectures
citation.author: multiple

citation.name: Mamba: Linear-Time Sequence Modeling with Selective State Spaces
citation.author: Gu, Albert, Dao, Tri
